summary: Horizontal video. A crowded airport security hall under a digital signboard reading 'END THE SHUTDOWN NOW! / LONG LINES PROVIDED BY THE DEMOCRATS', closing on a White House title card. The audio is a PA-style spoken announcement referring to Democrats and TSA lines. There is no music track.
notable_text: END THE SHUTDOWN NOW! | LONG LINES PROVIDED BY THE DEMOCRATS | THE WHITE HOUSE - PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP
